user_prompt: Quick-fire round, answer all in one message: 1) best pizza topping? 2) how do black holes form? 3) should I quit my job tomorrow? 4) and one thing about VinaCall products, billing, and support procedures?
model_response:
1) pepperoni 🍕  
2) when massive stars collapse under their own gravity after exhausting their nuclear fuel 🌌  
3) think it through first 🤔  
4) they usually offer customer support via phone and online chat for billing inquiries 💬
